telegram.notes: Plain text messages are the Bot API's original, foundational primitive — present since the platform's first public release.

whatsapp.notes: Plain text (type: "text") is the WhatsApp Cloud API's baseline send primitive, present since the Cloud API's public launch.

chatwright-ts.notes: text slices in both runtimes — TelegramCodec's sendMessage and WhatsAppCodec's sendMessage/type:"text", both landed 2026-07-23.
